testcase.name: Smoke Suite › S1: Student login -> dashboard loads
Smoke Suite › S2: Parent login -> family view loads
Smoke Suite › S3: Superadmin login -> admin panel accessible
Smoke Suite › S4: Invalid credentials -> error message
Smoke Suite › S5: Unauthenticated user redirected to login
Smoke Suite › S6: Student can navigate to quests
Smoke Suite › S7: Student can navigate to journal
Smoke Suite › S8: Student can navigate to profile
